subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-10-05 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: Christ - may my spirit be a sacrifice unto Him - proclaimed, ere His martyrdom, that the stones which are utterly neglected and, to all outward seeming, are of no use whatsoever [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حضرت مسیح روحی له الفداء قبل از شهادتشان می فرمودند که سنگهائی که ابداً معتنی به نیستند، بظاهر به هیچ کاری نمی خورند
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @suffering; rejection of Christ, @spiritual transformation
